meaning: 1. to prefer; 2. to be partial to sth; 3. preference
sentence: 她对辣食有明显的偏好。
pinyin: Tā duì là shí yǒu míngxiǎn de piānhào.
english: She has a clear preference for spicy food.

meaning: 1. to work on one's own; 2. to work single-handed; 3. individual
sentence: 他辞职后决定单干，自己开公司。
pinyin: Tā cízhí hòu juédìng dāngān, zìjǐ kāi gōngsī.
english: After quitting his job, he decided to go it alone and start his own company.

sentence: 这部电影的主题曲听了让人很感动。
pinyin: Zhè bù diàn yǐng de zhǔ tí qū tīng le ràng rén hěn gǎn dòng.
english: The theme song of this film is very moving to listen to.

sentence: 大学第一年我们要学电学基础知识。
pinyin: Dà xué dì yī nián wǒ men yào xué diàn xué jī chǔ zhī shi.
english: In the first year of university, we have to study the basics of electrical engineering.

meaning: abbr. for 信報財經新聞|信报财经新闻, Hong Kong Economic Journal
sentence: 他每天早上都买一份信报看财经新闻。
pinyin: Tā měi tiān zǎo shang dōu mǎi yī fèn xìn bào kàn cái jīng xīn wén.
english: He buys a copy of the Hong Kong Economic Journal every morning to read the financial news.

sentence: 闯红灯是犯法的，你要小心。
pinyin: Chuǎng hóng dēng shì fàn fǎ de, nǐ yào xiǎo xīn.
english: Running a red light is breaking the law; you need to be careful.

meaning: to seek investment or funding; investment promotion
sentence: 市政府今年加大力度招商引资。
pinyin: Shì zhèng fǔ jīn nián jiā dà lì dù zhāo shāng yǐn zī.
english: The city government is stepping up its investment promotion efforts this year.

meaning: to administer; to have jurisdiction over
sentence: 这个市下辖三个区和两个县。
pinyin: Zhè ge shì xià xiá sān ge qū hé liǎng ge xiàn.
english: This city has jurisdiction over three districts and two counties.

sentence: 朱元璋建立明朝后选择南京建都。
pinyin: Zhū Yuán zhāng jiàn lì Míng cháo hòu xuǎn zé Nán jīng jiàn dū.
english: After founding the Ming Dynasty, Zhu Yuanzhang chose Nanjing as the capital.

sentence: 孩子的心灵是纯洁的。
pinyin: Hái zi de xīn líng shì chún jié de.
english: Children's hearts are pure.

meaning: stand side by side; be juxtaposed
sentence: 两人并列第一，都获得了金牌。
pinyin: Liǎng rén bìngliè dì yī, dōu huòdéle jīnpái.
english: The two tied for first place and both received gold medals.

sentence: 她买了一辆微型车，停车方便多了。
pinyin: Tā mǎile yī liàng wēixíng chē, tíngchē fāngbiàn duō le.
english: She bought a miniature car, making parking much more convenient.

sentence: 他去外科做了一个小手术。
pinyin: Tā qù wài kē zuò le yī gè xiǎo shǒu shù.
english: He went to the surgery department for a minor operation.

sentence: 你能帮我估算一下装修要多少钱吗？
pinyin: Nǐ néng bāng wǒ gū suàn yīxià zhuāngxiū yào duōshǎo qián ma?
english: Can you help me estimate roughly how much the renovation will cost?

sentence: 她对这份工作还有一些疑虑。
pinyin: Tā duì zhè fèn gōngzuò hái yǒu yīxiē yílǜ.
english: She still has some misgivings about this job.

meaning: 1. to present clearly; 2. to give prominence to; 3. to magnify; 4. cle
sentence: 这次活动凸显了团队合作的重要性。
pinyin: Zhè cì huódòng tūxiǎn le tuánduì hézuò de zhòngyàoxìng.
english: This event highlighted the importance of teamwork.

sentence: 在网上发布虚假信息诽谤他人是违法的。
pinyin: Zài wǎng shàng fābù xūjiǎ xìnxī fěi bàng tārén shì wéifǎ de.
english: Posting false information online to slander others is illegal.

sentence: 他喜欢边看电视边嚼花生。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān biān kàn diànshì biān jiáo huāshēng.
english: He likes to chew peanuts while watching TV.

sentence: 你把钥匙放进冰箱里，真是神经病。
pinyin: Nǐ bǎ yàoshi fàng jìn bīngxiāng lǐ, zhēnshi shénjīngbìng.
english: You put your keys in the fridge — you're out of your mind.

sentence: 总公司把部分工程分包给了当地团队。
pinyin: Zǒng gōngsī bǎ bùfen gōngchéng fēnbāo gěi le dāngdì tuánduì.
english: The main company subcontracted part of the project to a local team.

sentence: 她参加了一个去云南的旅游团。
pinyin: Tā cānjiā le yī gè qù Yúnnán de lǚyóutuán.
english: She joined a tour group going to Yunnan.

sentence: 这家初创公司找到了一位大金主支持他们。
pinyin: Zhè jiā chūchuàng gōngsī zhǎodào le yī wèi dà jīnzhǔ zhīchí tāmen.
english: This startup found a major financial backer to support them.

sentence: 市长任内政绩突出，赢得了居民好评。
pinyin: Shìzhǎng rèn nèi zhèngjì tūchū, yíngdé le jūmín hǎopíng.
english: The mayor's track record during his term was outstanding and won residents' praise.

sentence: 这辆卡车用柴油，不用汽油。
pinyin: Zhè liàng kǎchē yòng cháiyóu, bú yòng qìyóu.
english: This truck runs on diesel, not gasoline.

sentence: 球队在客场赢球非常不容易。
pinyin: Qiúduì zài kèchǎng yíngqiú fēicháng bù róngyì.
english: It's very hard for a team to win at an away game.

sentence: 四川盆地气候温暖湿润。
pinyin: Sìchuān péndì qìhòu wēnnuǎn shīrùn.
english: The Sichuan Basin has a warm, humid climate.

sentence: 这个品牌的门店遍及全国各大城市。
pinyin: Zhège pǐnpái de méndiàn biànjí quánguó gè dà chéngshì.
english: This brand's stores extend to every major city across the country.

sentence: 警察迅速控制住了那几名暴徒。
pinyin: Jǐngchá xùnsù kòngzhì zhù le nà jǐ míng bàotú.
english: The police quickly brought those several thugs under control.

meaning: 1. target; 2. aim; 3. objective; 4. what one hopes to gain
sentence: 这笔合同的标的是一批进口设备。
pinyin: Zhè bǐ hétong de biāodì shì yī pī jìnkǒu shèbèi.
english: The object of this contract is a batch of imported equipment.

sentence: 他在大学主修史学，对古代很感兴趣。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué zhǔxiū shǐxué, duì gǔdài hěn gǎn xìngqù.
english: He majored in historiography at university and is very interested in antiquity.

sentence: 我下班后顺路去超级市场买了蔬菜。
pinyin: Wǒ xiàbān hòu shùnlù qù chāojí shìchǎng mǎi le shūcài.
english: After work I stopped by the supermarket on the way and bought some vegetables.

sentence: 电脑死机了，只好重启一下。
pinyin: Diànnǎo sǐjī le, zhǐhǎo chóngqǐ yīxià.
english: The computer froze, so I had no choice but to restart it.

meaning: 1. to treat as guilty those associated with an offender (family, neigh
sentence: 古代一人犯罪，家人也可能受到连坐。
pinyin: Gǔdài yī rén fànzuì, jiārén yě kěnéng shòudào liánzuò.
english: In ancient times, if one person committed a crime, family members could also be implicated.

sentence: 珠江三角洲是中国重要的经济区域。
pinyin: Zhūjiāng sānjiǎozhōu shì Zhōngguó zhòngyào de jīngjì qūyù.
english: The Pearl River Delta is an important economic region in China.

sentence: 他靠外卡入围了今年的网球公开赛。
pinyin: Tā kào wài kǎ rù wéi le jīn nián de wǎng qiú gōng kāi sài.
english: He got into this year's tennis open with a wild card entry.

sentence: 我们家换了数字电视，频道多了很多。
pinyin: Wǒ men jiā huàn le shù zì diàn shì, pín dào duō le hěn duō.
english: We switched to digital television at home, and now there are many more channels.

sentence: 这个城市靠海，水产资源很丰富。
pinyin: Zhè ge chéng shì kào hǎi, shuǐ chǎn zī yuán hěn fēng fù.
english: This city is by the sea, so aquatic resources are very abundant.

sentence: 他是个明达的人，从不斤斤计较。
pinyin: Tā shì ge míng dá de rén, cóng bù jīn jīn jì jiào.
english: He is a reasonable man who never quibbles over small things.

sentence: 改革开放后这里的工商业发展很快。
pinyin: Gǎi gé kāi fàng hòu zhè lǐ de gōng shāng yè fā zhǎn hěn kuài.
english: After the reform and opening up, industry and commerce here developed very rapidly.

sentence: 他为这家杂志撰文已有十年了。
pinyin: Tā wèi zhè jiā zá zhì zhuàn wén yǐ yǒu shí nián le.
english: He has been writing articles for this magazine for ten years.

meaning: the 24 or 25 official dynastic histories; true history, as opposed to
sentence: 正史记载的内容比野史更可靠。
pinyin: Zhèng shǐ jì zǎi de nèi róng bǐ yě shǐ gèng kě kào.
english: The records in official dynastic histories are more reliable than unofficial accounts.

sentence: 他担任帮办一职，协助处理日常事务。
pinyin: Tā dān rèn bāng bàn yī zhí, xié zhù chǔ lǐ rì cháng shì wù.
english: He serves as a deputy, helping to handle daily affairs.

sentence: 她在大学里念的是公共行政专业。
pinyin: Tā zài dà xué lǐ niàn de shì gōng gòng xíng zhèng zhuān yè.
english: She majored in public administration at university.

meaning: colloquial term for 生肖[sheng1 xiao4] the animals associated with the y
sentence: 你的属相是什么？我是属羊的。
pinyin: Nǐ de shǔ xiāng shì shén me? Wǒ shì shǔ yáng de.
english: What is your zodiac animal? Mine is the goat.

sentence: 软件的更新版修复了很多漏洞。
pinyin: Ruǎn jiàn de gēng xīn bǎn xiū fù le hěn duō lòu dòng.
english: The updated version of the software fixed many bugs.

sentence: 他每周都会买一张彩票试试运气。
pinyin: Tā měi zhōu dōu huì mǎi yī zhāng cǎipiào shìshi yùnqi.
english: He buys a lottery ticket every week to try his luck.

sentence: 下雨天他照样骑自行车上班。
pinyin: Xià yǔ tiān tā zhàoyàng qí zìxíngchē shàngbān.
english: Even on rainy days he still bikes to work as usual.

sentence: 农场里养了各种牲畜。
pinyin: Nóngchǎng lǐ yǎng le gè zhǒng shēngchù.
english: The farm raises all kinds of livestock.

sentence: 他患有慢性胃病，每天要按时吃药。
pinyin: Tā huàn yǒu màn xìng wèibìng, měitiān yào ànshí chī yào.
english: He has a chronic stomach condition and needs to take medicine on time every day.

sentence: 元宵节家家户户挂起了灯笼。
pinyin: Yuánxiāo jié jiājiā-hùhù guà qǐ le dēnglóng.
english: Every household hung up lanterns for the Lantern Festival.
